title: Ipomoea cymosa

intro: Ipomoea cymosa, also known as Mexican morning-glory, is a species of flowering plant in the Convolvulaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. Its bioactive constituents include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal effects. In traditional medicine, Ipomoea cymosa is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat colds, bronchitis, and other respiratory conditions.
